name: 南京
description: Nanjing, ancient capital of six dynasties and capital of the Republic of China, is a city of profound historical significance. Home to the Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum, Ming Xiaoling Tomb (UNESCO), and theMemorial Hall of the Victims in Nanjing Massacre. A cultural crossroads between north and south China.
highlights: Ming Xiaoling Tomb - UNESCO World Heritage

climate.tips: Best in spring for flowers or autumn for foliage. Summers hot and humid. Winters cold with occasional snow. Spring plum blossoms and fall gingko are spectacular.

attractions.name: 中山陵
attractions.description: Magnificent mausoleum honoring Dr. Sun Yat-sen, founder of the Republic of China, on Purple Mountain with 392 steps.
attractions.tips: Arrive early to avoid crowds. Wear comfortable shoes. Combine with Ming Xiaoling Tomb nearby.

attractions.name: 明孝陵
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site - the tomb of Emperor Hongwu, founder of the Ming Dynasty, with spectacular Avenue of Stone Animals.
attractions.ticketPrice: 70 CNY (includes Ming Xiaoling and Music Square)
attractions.tips: Walk the 600-year-old avenue at sunrise for magical light. Best in autumn for golden gingko. Combine with nearby Purple Mountain.

attractions.name: 南京大屠杀纪念馆
attractions.nameEn: Memorial Hall of the Victims in Nanjing Massacre
attractions.description: A powerful memorial to the 300,000 victims of the 1937 Nanjing Massacre, with exhibits and pilgrimage hall.
attractions.tips: Bring tissues. Audio guide available. Allow time for reflection. Combine with nearby Fuzi Temple.

attractions.name: 总统府
attractions.description: The presidential office of Sun Yat-sen and later Chiang Kai-shek, now a museum showcasing 600 years of history.
attractions.tips: Good audio guide. Large complex with much history. Morning visits recommended.

attractions.name: 夫子庙
attractions.description: Ancient temple complex with traditional architecture, markets, and boat rides on the Qinhuai River.
attractions.tips: Best at night when illuminated. Try local snacks from vendors. Take boat ride on river.

attractions.name: 紫金山
attractions.description: A 450-meter mountain south of the Ming Xiaoling with hiking trails, ancient temples, and panoramic city views.
attractions.tips: Plan full day to cover major sites. Take cable car up, walk down. Combine multiple attractions.

attractions.name: 玄武湖
attractions.description: A beautiful urban lake with parks, gardens, and the ancient Ming city wall views, perfect for cycling and walking.
attractions.tips: Rent bikes around the lake. Combine with nearby Purple Mountain. Beautiful at sunset.

attractions.name: 老门东
attractions.description: Restored historic district near Fuzi Temple with traditional architecture, crafts, and local snacks.
attractions.tips: Best evening with lighting. Try duck blood soup and small sesame balls. Less crowded than Fuzi Temple area.

attractions.name: 雨花台
attractions.description: Memorial park and former execution site during Taiping Rebellion era, now a peaceful public park with solemn memorials.
attractions.tips: Arrive in morning for peaceful atmosphere. The memorial hall is very moving. Combine with nearby Nanjing South Station.

attractions.name: 中华门城堡
attractions.description: Ming Dynasty city gate and fortifications, one of the best-preserved Chinese castle walls with unique brick structure.
attractions.tips: Walk along the wall for panoramic views. The underground chambers are fascinating. Less crowded than other attractions.

attractions.name: 灵谷寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist temple in Purple Mountain area, famous for银杏树林 and the resonant Dagoba.
attractions.ticketPrice: 35 CNY (includes Linggu Temple and Music Square)
attractions.tips: Best in autumn for golden ginkgo. The pagoda offers great views. Very peaceful in early morning.

attractions.name: 秦淮河
attractions.description: Historic river flowing through Nanjing's old city, famous for its illuminated boat rides and Riverside views.
attractions.tips: Take evening boat for best views. Combine with Fuzi Temple and Laochengli. The riverbank is great for walking.

attractions.name: 紫金山天文台
attractions.description: Historic astronomical observatory on Purple Mountain, home to ancient telescopes and stellar artifacts.
attractions.tips: Combine with Purple Mountain hike. Take cable car to save energy. Clear nights best for stargazing.

attractions.name: 梅花山
attractions.description: Famous for thousands of plum blossom trees, offering stunning pink and white blooms in winter and early spring.
attractions.ticketPrice: Included in Ming Xiaoling ticket (70 CNY)
attractions.tips: Visit during plum blossom season (February-March). The fragrance is amazing. Less crowded on weekdays.

attractions.name: 石象路
attractions.description: The iconic 600-meter avenue lined with massive stone animals leading to Ming Xiaoling Tomb.
attractions.ticketPrice: Included in Ming Xiaoling ticket (70 CNY)
attractions.tips: Visit at sunrise for magical light. Autumn for golden gingko. The most photographed spot in Nanjing.

attractions.name: 朝天宫
attractions.description: Ming Dynasty imperial palace for worshiping ancestors, now a museum showcasing ancient architecture.
attractions.tips: Good for understanding Ming ritual culture. The architecture is impressive. Combine with nearby Fuzi Temple.

attractions.name: 南京大学
attractions.description: Prestigious historic university with beautiful Qing Dynasty architecture and tree-lined campus.
attractions.tips: Visit in spring for coral trees. The main building is beautiful. Great for architecture enthusiasts.

attractions.name: 大报恩寺
attractions.description: Rebuilt on site of historic Ming Dynasty temple, known for its modern glass exhibitions and tall pagoda.
attractions.tips: Modern temple with interesting exhibitions. The glass walkway is impressive. Arrive early to avoid crowds.

attractions.name: 玄武湖公园
attractions.description: Large urban lake park with five islands, cycling paths, cherry blossoms, and ancient city wall views.
attractions.tips: Rent bikes (15 CNY/hour) to tour the lake. Best at sunset. The cherry blossoms in March are spectacular.

attractions.name: 桃叶渡
attractions.description: Historic riverside spot famous in classical poetry, now a charming area with traditional shops.
attractions.tips: Best at night with lights. Named after poet's love story. Great for photos. Combine with boat ride.

attractions.name: 鸡鸣寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist temple on Purple Mountain, known for its beautiful plum blossoms in winter and peaceful atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Best in February for plum blossoms. Combine with Purple Mountain walk. The vegetarian noodles nearby are famous.

attractions.name: 阅江楼
attractions.description: Historic tower on Lion Hill offering panoramic views of the Yangtze River and Nanjing skyline.
attractions.address: Lion Hill, Huaihai Road, Xiaguan District
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for river views. Combined ticket available with Zhonghua Gate. Take photos at the Lion Head.

attractions.name: 珍珠泉
attractions.description: Beautiful spring area with natural hot springs, ideal for family outings with playground and amusement rides.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Come early for animal shows. The hot spring is excellent in winter. Combine with Pukou scenic area.

attractions.name: 牛首山文化旅游区
attractions.description: Modern Buddhist cultural park featuring the stunning Palace of Bliss temple built into a former mining pit.
attractions.tips: One of Nanjing's newest attractions. The underground palace is spectacular. Book tickets online. Arrive early for fewer crowds.

attractions.name: 中山植物园
attractions.description: Historic botanical garden at the foot of Purple Mountain, featuring diverse plant collections and peaceful walking paths.
attractions.tips: Best in spring for cherry blossoms and autumn for foliage. The azalea garden is stunning in April. Great for nature photography.

attractions.name: 燕雀湖
attractions.description: Picturesque lake near Ming Xiaoling famous for its lotus flowers and reflection views of Purple Mountain.
attractions.tips: Best in summer for lotus. The reflection of Purple Mountain is famous. Combine with Ming Xiaoling visit. Morning light is magical.

restaurants.name: 南京大牌档
restaurants.address: Multiple locations including Xuanwu and Fuzi Temple
restaurants.description: Popular chain serving authentic Nanjing and Jiangsu cuisine in traditional atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 狮子桥
restaurants.description: One-diamond Black Pearl restaurant known for refined Jiangsu cuisine and elegant dining.

restaurants.name: 尹氏鸡汁汤包
restaurants.description: Legendary tiny soup dumplings in rich chicken broth, a Nanjing institution since 1920s.

restaurants.name: 回味鸭血粉丝汤
restaurants.description: Popular chain famous for duck blood noodle soup, a quintessential Nanjing breakfast.

restaurants.name: 咸亨酒店
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant inspired by Lu Xun's famous work, serving Shaoxing wine and traditional dishes.

restaurants.name: 绿柳居
restaurants.description: Famous vegetarian restaurant established 1912, known for meat substitutes and Buddhist cuisine.

restaurants.name: 小笼包店
restaurants.description: Local breakfast spots serving Nanjing-style soup dumplings and congee.

restaurants.name: 秦淮人家
restaurants.description: Riverside restaurant serving quality Nanjing cuisine with evening boat ride option.

restaurants.name: 韩复兴
restaurants.description: Famous for authentic Nanjing salted duck, a must-buy for visitors to take home.

restaurants.name: 奇芳阁
restaurants.description: Historic snack restaurant known for traditional Nanjing breakfast and local delicacies.

restaurants.name: 永和园
restaurants.description: Long-standing snack shop famous for wontons and crab roe dumplings.

restaurants.name: 六朝面馆
restaurants.description: Popular noodle shop serving traditional Nanjing-style noodles with various toppings.

restaurants.name: 鸡鸣寺素面
restaurants.description: Vegetarian noodles near Jiming Temple, known for Buddhist cuisine and peaceful atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 南京精菜馆
restaurants.description: One-diamond Black Pearl restaurant offering refined Jiangsu cuisine with elegant presentation.

restaurants.name: 金陵饭店梅苑
restaurants.description: High-end restaurant in Jinling Hotel serving premium Jiangsu cuisine with imperial heritage.

restaurants.name: 清真马祥兴
restaurants.description: Historic Muslim restaurant known for beef dishes and traditional Halal Nanjing cuisine.

restaurants.name: 夫子庙小吃广场
restaurants.description: Open-air snack market with dozens of vendors serving local Nanjing snacks and street food.

restaurants.name: 金陵小红枣
restaurants.description: Local dessert shop famous for red date soup and traditional Nanjing sweet soups.

restaurants.name: 东南大学老食堂
restaurants.description: University cafeteria open to visitors, serving authentic and cheap local dishes.

restaurants.name: 明瓦廊美食街
restaurants.description: Famous evening food street with variety of local snacks and international cuisine.

restaurants.name: 海底捞火锅
restaurants.description: Famous chain hotpot restaurant with exceptional service. Known for manicotti, freebies, and entertainment while waiting.

restaurants.name: 全聚德
restaurants.description: Legendary Peking duck restaurant with crispy skin and traditional preparation methods.

restaurants.name: 小厨娘
restaurants.description: Popular home-style Jiangsu cuisine restaurant with comfortable dining atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 外婆家
restaurants.description: Popular chain serving flavorful Zhejiang-style dishes at reasonable prices.

restaurants.name: 南京大牌档
restaurants.address: Multiple locations including Deji and Xuanwu
restaurants.description: Popular chain serving authentic Nanjing and Jiangsu cuisine in traditional atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 民国红公馆
restaurants.description: High-end restaurant serving dishes inspired by Republic of China era cuisine with elegant atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 李记清真馆
restaurants.description: Famous halal restaurant known for beef products and traditional Muslim cuisine.

restaurants.name: 莲湖糕团店
restaurants.description: Famous snack shop specializing in traditional Nanjing rice cakes and sweet pastries.

arrival.tips: Airport 40km from city center. Airport bus to city (5 CNY) or taxi (150 CNY). Metro LineS1 to downtown.

arrival.to: Nanjing Railway Station / Nanjing South Station
arrival.tips: Nanjing South for high-speed from Shanghai/Hangzhou. Nanjing Station for Beijing/Shanghai slow trains. Both have metro.

metro: Connects to both stations and airport
bike: Unlock: 1 CNY, then 0.5-1 CNY per 30 min

hotels.name: 南京金陵饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Book well ahead. The original 5-star in Nanjing. Sunday brunch is famous.

hotels.name: 南京香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for first-time visitors. Book river view rooms.

hotels.name: 南京绿地洲际酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Newer property with best views. Great for business travelers.

hotels.name: 状元楼酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for sightseeing. Book during off-peak season.

hotels.name: 南京国际青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Great for backpackers. English speaking staff.

hotels.name: 南京苏宁诺富特酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for business travelers. Near metro Line 1.

hotels.name: 南京华泰万丽酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for both business and leisure. Book river view rooms.

hotels.name: 南京玄武饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Good alternative to luxury hotels. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 南京水游城假日酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Great for shoppers. Connected to Aqua City mall.

hotels.name: 南京瑞金路亚朵酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Popular Chinese boutique hotel chain. Great value.

hotels.name: 南京新街口如家酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option near Xinjiekou. Simple but reliable.

hotels.name: 南京夫子庙青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Great location for night market and river walks.

hotels.name: 南京紫金山庄
hotels.bookingTips: Best for relaxation. Surrounded by Purple Mountain scenery.

hotels.name: 南京奥体中心亚朵酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for sports fans. Near Nanjing Olympic Sports Center.

hotels.name: 南京夫子庙民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Experience traditional Nanjing living. Book well ahead.

culturalTips.title: Memorial Culture
culturalTips.content: Nanjing is deeply connected to Chinese modern history. Visit the Massacre Memorial Hall for reflection. The Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum represents founding of modern China. Presidential Palace shows ROC era.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Nanjing food is savory and slightly oily. Must-try: duck blood soup, salt duck, soup dumplings. The city's cuisine reflects its position as 'the home of Jinling cuisine'.

culturalTips.title: Avoiding Crowds
culturalTips.content: Nanjing's attractions can be very crowded. Visit Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum and Ming Xiaoling early morning. Fuzi Temple is best at night. Weekdays are quieter.

culturalTips.title: Seasonal Highlights
culturalTips.content: Nanjing's gingko trees are legendary. The turn color in mid-November along银杏大道. Cherry blossoms at Xuanwu Lake in spring. Plum blossoms in winter.

culturalTips.title: Six Dynasties Heritage
culturalTips.content: Nanjing was capital during Six Dynasties period (220-589 AD). Visit the Nanjing Museum for artifacts from this era. The Zonghua Gate reflects military architecture of that time. Ling Guo Temple is a surviving Buddhist site.

culturalTips.title: Literary Legacy
culturalTips.content: Nanjing inspired many famous writers including Cao Xueqin (Dream of Red Chamber), Li Yu, and modern writer Ye Shengtao. The Nanjing Museum has an excellent collection of historical documents and calligraphy.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Snacks Culture
culturalTips.content: Nanjing is famous for street snacks: duck blood soup (鸭血粉丝汤), small sesame balls (雨花石汤圆), and beef offal. The Fuzi Temple night market and Laochengli are best areas for snack exploration.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Dialect
culturalTips.content: Nanjing dialect is one of the oldest Mandarin dialects, preserving many elements from Ming Dynasty imperial speech. It's known for being more 'down to earth' than Beijing dialect. Locals appreciate visitors trying a few phrases.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Crafts
culturalTips.content: Nanjing is famous for Yuhua stones (雨花石), silk products, and Nanjing brocade (云锦). The Nanjing Yuhua Stone Garden in Zhonghua Gate area showcases these colorful stones. Nanjing brocade is a UNESCO intangible heritage.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Nanjing has unique tea culture featuring Qimen black tea from nearby Huangshan. The famous 'First Spring Tea' is picked in March. Tea houses along Xuanwu Lake offer pleasant afternoon tea experiences.

culturalTips.title: Nanjing Gardens
culturalTips.content: Like Suzhou, Nanjing has historic private gardens. The Xuanwu Lake area has many traditional pavilions. The Presidential Palace has beautiful garden areas. The old Ming palace ruins include ancient garden elements.

culturalTips.title: Yangtze River Culture
culturalTips.content: Nanjing sits on the Yangtze River, historically crucial for trade and defense. The river wall offers walking paths. The historic Xiaguan area was once the main port. Yuejiang Tower offers panoramic river views.

culturalTips.title: Academic Heritage
culturalTips.content: Nanjing has been an education center for centuries. Nanjing University and Southeast University are prestigious institutions. The old campus buildings are architecturally significant and open to visitors.

culturalTips.title: Jiangnan Music
culturalTips.content: Nanjing is part of Jiangnan region known for traditional music. The Qinhuai River area has historical connections to folk music and opera. The local opera style influenced many Chinese performing arts.

culturalTips.title: Modern Nanjing
culturalTips.content: Nanjing has vibrant modern nightlife in Xinjiekou and Jianye districts.1912 bar street near Presidential Palace has many restaurants and bars. The Qinhuai River area offers evening boat rides with city views.

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
